products.title: Golden Goose Wmns Superstar ‘White Silver Ice Blue’
Golden Goose Super-Star Low-Top Sneakers – White Leather & Green Heel Tab (Men’s)
products.description: Elevate your sneaker game with the iconic Golden Goose Super-Star sneakers in a timeless white-and-green palette. Crafted in Italy from premium buffed leather, these low-tops boast the signature suede star and a vibrant green heel tab branded with the GGDB logo. Perforated detailing enhances breathability, while a textured off-white rubber midsole and treaded outsole deliver subtle contrast and nostalgic vintage appeal. Finished with tonal stitching and a round toe, these sneakers blend urban style with artisanal flair. Element Content Title Golden Goose Super-Star Sneakers – White Leather & Green Heel Tab Description White leather low-tops with green heel tab, suede star detail, and textured off-white sole—handcrafted in Italy. Key Highlights • Buffed white leather upper • Green branded heel tab • Suede star emblem • Perforated detailing • Textured rubber midsole and treaded outsole • Vintage-inspired finish

products.title: Golden Goose Leather Ball Star Sneakers
Golden Goose Superstar Leather Trainers - White/Purple/Black
Golden Goose Ball Star “Triple White” Sneakers – Men’s (GMF00117 F004170 10100)
products.description: Elevate your sneaker collection with the Golden Goose Ball Star “Triple White” , a staple of Italian luxury craftsmanship blended with retro flair. Released in 2023, this lifestyle sneaker reimagines the classic 1980s athletic silhouette using premium leather with a deliberately worn “lived-in” aesthetic. The monochrome white palette spans the upper, star emblem, heel tab, and sole—yet each pair boasts subtle distressing and artisanal finishing. Individually handcrafted in Italy, they deliver both elevated style and laid-back comfort. Available now on GOAT after being authenticated for authenticity and resale readiness. Element Details Title Golden Goose Ball Star “Triple White” Sneakers – GMF00117 F004170 10100 (Men’s) Description Vintage-style all-white leather sneakers with Golden Goose star, worn-in finish, handcrafted in Italy. Key Highlights • Monochrome white leather upper, star, heel tab, and sole • Signature distressed finish • 2023 release • SKU: GMF00117-F004170-10100 • Made in Italy craftsmanship
